begining_of_contract.text: วันที่เริ่มสํญญา

root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as memname ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as member_group_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.remark ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no)) as member_group_name
,sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position.description ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_code ,pka_mem.fp_desc_position(sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_code ) as position_name
,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ,trunc(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date)/12) as age , pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as age_1
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.max_loan_permit
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_share , sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date) as agetext_member
, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value , sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthdep ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthshare ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthloan ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.other_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.fee_amount
,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc ,sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.bank_code ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.bank_acc_no ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.telephone ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_payment_type_code ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_date
,( SELECT sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description FROM sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj WHERE ( trim(sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type) = trim(sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type) ) and ( sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_objective_code ) ) as loan_objective_description
from sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position , sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_cnt_m_coop ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type ,sc_mem_m_member_address ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and trim(sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type) = trim(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type) and sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position.group_position = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.group_position and sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.type_pay_money = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status <> '0' /*WHERE*/

r_ktm_sakol_req_form_02_nest_paid.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.type_pay_money, sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code, sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no, sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.paid_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.seq_no, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.type_pay_money ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = {0} ) )

r_ktm_sakol_req_form_02_nest_month.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_history.monthly_pay_p, sc_lon_m_loan_history.monthly_pay_i, sc_lon_m_loan_history.last_period, sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_history.sequence_no, sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_of_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_installment, sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_balance_of_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_card.pending_amount, sc_lon_m_rule.atm_status, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code FROM sc_lon_m_loan_history, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = {0} ) )

r_ktm_sakol_req_form_02_nest_history.sq: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_history.last_period, sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target, sc_lon_m_loan_history.monthly_pay, sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_installment, sc_lon_m_loan_history.monthly_pay_p, sc_lon_m_loan_history.monthly_pay_i, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_of_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_history.interest_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_balance_of_loan, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card.pending_amount, sc_lon_m_rule.atm_status, sc_lon_m_loan_history.not_hold_atm, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance FROM sc_lon_m_loan_history, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = {0} ) )

r_ktm_sakol_req_form_02_nest_coll.sql:
select sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no) as membername ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no)) as member_group_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no) as salary ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no) as share_stock
from sc_lon_m_req_coll , sc_lon_m_loan_request where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = {0} and collateral_type_code = '01'
